description: 8-batch plan for the ingestionfix_v3 Phase 3 topic-coverage backfill. Batch 1 is the Quality Gate batch (smallest / least load-bearing topics); batches 2-8 run autonomously via scripts/run_topic_backfill_chain.sh once the gate passes. Covers all 39 top-level taxonomy entries (subtopics like beneficio_auditoria are covered by their parent batch).

batches.label: gate
batches.rationale: Small, less-load-bearing topics. Chosen as the Quality Gate batch: if something systemic is wrong, we want to discover it on ~20 docs, not on the 80 in batch 8.

notes: Estimates are deliberate over-counts; real docs/min depends on how many topic-tagged docs live in production at chain-run time.
Batch 1 topics were curated for safety: dropping beneficio_auditoria (it is a subtopic of declaracion_renta and is covered by batch 8).
otros_sectoriales is a taxonomy catch-all and is small enough to belong in the gate batch.

declaracion_renta subtopics (patrimonio_fiscal_renta, ingresos_fiscales_renta, etc.) are not listed explicitly — the additive reclassification re-stamps their tema values on re-sink, and documents.tema for those rows is declaracion_renta.
